title: Baby Elephant Pixel Stitch Pattern
graphImageAlt: Baby Elephant Pixel Stitch Pattern graph
intro: Follow the pattern row by row online and track your progress as you crochet.

materials.label: Yarn - based off a 200 rd skein
materials.detail: Blue - 1 skein, Black - 1 skein, Gray - 1 skein, Light Gray - 2 skeins, Pink - 1 skein, White - 1 skein, Yellow - 2 skein

materials.label: Other
materials.detail: Tapestry needle, scissors, stitch markers, bobbins
